zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP於1560年出生在英國戴文波爾莫時，他的父親Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon33歲，母親Elizabeth SYDENHAM28歲。他於1582年與Elizabeth Clifton在英國薩默塞特巴林頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1626年2月9日在英國戴文諾斯 莫爾頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 莫爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP于1560年出生在英国戴文波爾莫时，他的父亲Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon33岁，母亲Elizabeth SYDENHAM28岁。他于1582年与Elizabeth Clifton在英国薩默塞特巴林頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1626年2月9日在英国戴文諾斯 莫爾頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文諾斯 莫爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bampfylde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Amyas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; possibly a variant of   Amias .  It first occurs in  Spenser's  Faerie Queene, in which it is the name of a ‘squire of low degree’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP was born in 1560, in Poltimore, Devon, England, his father, Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth SYDENHAM, was 28. He married Elizabeth Clifton in 1582, in Barrington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 February 1626, in North Molton, Devon, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP est né en 1560, à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth SYDENHAM, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Clifton en 1582, à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 février 1626, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP 1560 in Poltimore, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon 33 und seine Mutter Elizabeth SYDENHAM 28. Er hat 1582 in Barrington, Somerset, England Elizabeth Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1626 im Alter von 66 Jahren in North Molton, Devon, England und wurde in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP è nato il nel 1560 nel Poltimore, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth SYDENHAM, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Clifton nel 1582, nel Barrington, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1626, nel North Molton, Devon, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a North Molton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Amyas Bampfylde MPが1560年にイギリスデボンポルティモーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devonは33歳，母Elizabeth SYDENHAMは28歳であった。1582年にイギリスソメルセトバーリントンでElizabeth Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1626年2月9日にイギリスデボンノース モルトンで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンノース モルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP(이)가 1560년 영국 데폰 포팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth SYDENHAM(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1582년 영국 서머세트 배링턴에서 Elizabeth Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1626년 2월 9일 영국 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 모턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP nasceu em 1560, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth SYDENHAM, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Clifton em 1582, em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1626, em North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP родился в 1560 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth SYDENHAM, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Clifton в 1582 г. в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 февраля 1626 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP nació en 1560, en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth SYDENHAM, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Clifton en 1582, en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1626, en North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
